installCommand: cd backend && npm install && npx --yes esbuild@0.24.2 index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --legal-comments=none --external:expo-server-sdk --external:@aws-sdk/client-s3 --external:@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner --outfile=../api/colortrack-server.cjs && cd ../api && npm install
